action.reasoning: Starting fresh. Need to build RL pipeline using SB3 PPO with Dict observations for Minigrid. Plan: create model.py with custom feature extractor (CNN for image, embedding for direction, embedding+pooling for mission tokens), a wrapper to tokenize mission, and train.py with PPO on 40 parallel envs (4 per task). For first iteration, train with 500k timesteps to quickly test pipeline and get baseline eval. Submit eval immediately to measure iteration time and get score. Later iterations will scale up training.
